title: Blog management page updates
scope: Improve blog admin list filtering and post status visibility
Harden media/date rendering for relative URLs and invalid timestamps
Add empty-state and refresh UX improvements in blog management
Update CHANGELOG.md with completed work order entry
acceptance_criteria: Blog management list supports search plus status/category filtering with clear empty-state messaging
Blog status chips and summary cards show meaningful editorial state at a glance
Relative media paths and invalid date values render safely in list and editor preview surfaces
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Media preview URLs assume uploaded files are served by the API base host
rollback_plan: Revert commits associated with this work order
